title: Booking.com Hotel Details Scraper
description: Extract Booking.com property-page details by URL or by country plus hotel slug. Provide one hotel or batch multiple hotels in a single actor run.

url.title: Hotel URL
url.description: Full Booking.com hotel URL for a single hotel detail request. If URL is provided, it takes precedence over Country and Slug.

country.title: Country
country.description: Two-letter country code from the Booking.com hotel URL, such as fr, us, de, or gb. Use with Slug.

slug.title: Hotel Slug
slug.description: Booking.com hotel slug, such as ritz-paris. The trailing .html is optional.

urls.title: Batch Hotel URLs
urls.description: Optional list of Booking.com hotel URLs to process in one actor run.

hotels.title: Batch Hotels
hotels.description: Optional list of hotel request objects. Each item can include { "url" } or { "country", "slug" }.

url.title: Hotel URL
url.description: Full Booking.com hotel URL. Takes precedence over Country and Slug for this item.

country.title: Country
country.description: Two-letter country code from the Booking.com hotel URL.

slug.title: Hotel Slug
slug.description: Booking.com hotel slug. The trailing .html is optional.
